requirement.description: The BCM shall transmit the current door lock status on the CAN bus.

test_cases.title: Verify Unlocked State (0)
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; doors unlocked; monitor ID 0x100

test_cases.title: Verify Locked State (1)
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; doors locked; monitor ID 0x100

test_cases.title: Transition: Unlocked to Locked
Transition: Locked to Unlocked
Signal Stability
